title: The California Artificial Intelligence Transparency Act (CAITA) protects consumers by giving them the ability to determine if materials have been generated by AI

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California Artificial Intelligence Transparency Act (CAITA) requires large generative artificial intelligence (GenAI) system providers to label AI-generated materials.",
    "CAITA mandates visible and imperceptible embedded disclosures for AI-generated images, videos, and audio.",
    "The bill provides an AI-detection tool for users to ascertain whether content was created by AI.",
    "CAITA aims to protect consumers by ensuring they have the ability to determine if materials have been generated by AI.",
    "AI-generated images, audio, and video could be used for spreading political misinformation and creating deepfakes.",
    "The adoption of CAITA could advance provenance, transparency, and accountability regarding AI-generated products.",
    "The bill emphasizes the importance of disclosure and consumer awareness as AI continues to play a pivotal role in various industries."
  ]
}
```
